metadata.title: SCRPA All_Crimes Data Dictionary
metadata.description: Field definitions for the SCRPA enriched crime data output

Incident Date.description: Date the incident occurred (raw from RMS)

Report Date.description: Date the incident was reported/entered in RMS

Zone.description: Police zone number (whole number, observed range 5-9)

Narrative.description: Detailed incident narrative (cleaned of special characters)

BestTimeValue.description: Best available time of incident. Used for time-of-day analysis.
BestTimeValue.calculation: Cascade: Incident Time → if null, Incident Time_Between → if null, Report Time
BestTimeValue.usage: Derives Incident_Time (HH:MM:SS), StartOfHour, TimeOfDay, and TimeOfDay_SortKey

Incident_Date.calculation: Coalesce(Incident Date, Incident Date_Between, Report Date)

Incident_Date_Date.description: Best incident date as date type (for calculations)
Incident_Date_Date.calculation: Coalesce(Incident Date, Incident Date_Between, Report Date)

Report_Date_ForLagday.description: Report date for lag day calculation - CRITICAL: NO Incident_Date fallback
Report_Date_ForLagday.note: Used for IsLagDay and LagDays. When null, lag logic yields false/0.

Period.description: Reporting period classification based on Incident_Date
Period.note: Based on Incident_Date, NOT Report_Date. 7-Day uses calendar 7_Day_Start/7_Day_End for the resolved cycle (fixed window), not "today minus 7 days".

_Period_Debug.description: Debug info for period calculation (for validation)

cycle_name.description: Weekly cycle name (Report_Name) that contains Incident_Date
cycle_name.note: Set to "Historical" if Incident_Date falls outside all calendar 7-day windows (e.g., day after cycle end)

Backfill_7Day.description: True if incident occurred before cycle but reported during current 7-day window
Backfill_7Day.calculation: Incident_Date < CycleStart AND Report_Date_ForLagday IN [CycleStart, CycleEnd]

cycle_name_adjusted.description: Cycle name adjusted for backfill cases. For backfill lag incidents, attributes them to current report cycle.
cycle_name_adjusted.calculation: If Backfill_7Day=True then CurrentCycleName (current report cycle) else cycle_name
cycle_name_adjusted.note: Allows lag incidents reported during current 7-day window to be attributed to the current cycle for reporting

BiWeekly_Report_Name.description: Bi-weekly report name from cycle calendar (e.g., 26BW02)
BiWeekly_Report_Name.note: Populated from cycle calendar BiWeekly_Report_Name column when present. Format: YYBW## (YY=year, BW=bi-weekly, ##=period number)

IsCurrent7DayCycle.description: True if Report_Date_ForLagday falls within current 7-day cycle window

IsLagDay.description: True if incident occurred before the cycle that contains Report_Date_ForLagday

LagDays.description: Days between incident and cycle start (NOT Report_Date)
LagDays.note: CRITICAL: This is cycle-relative, not report-date-relative

StartOfHour.description: Start of hour for time grouping

ALL_INCIDENTS.calculation: Incident Type_1 + ", " + Incident Type_2 + ", " + Incident Type_3

Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2.description: Combined vehicle info with pipe separator

IncidentKey.description: Key for category lookup (ALL_INCIDENTS or Incident Type_1)

Category_Type.description: Incident category classification (e.g., Criminal Incidents, Public Safety and Welfare)
Category_Type.lookup_method: Exact match on Incident column, then Incident_Norm column

Response_Type.lookup_method: Exact match on Incident column, then Incident_Norm column

Time_Validation.description: Debug string showing time cascade resolution
